title: Here's Why You Should Retain West Pharmaceutical (WST) Now
text: West Pharmaceutical (WST) continues to gain momentum due to its strength in the Proprietary Products business. However, forex woes persist.

title: West Pharmaceutical's (WST) Syringe System to Improve Outcome
text: West Pharmaceutical's (WST) new CZ syringe system size is expected to enable a simpler patient experience and aid pharmaceutical companies in providing better access to their products.
